project.name: Cobbr
project.confidence_note: This audit reflects what is implemented or documented in the repository. It does not prove end-to-end validation on real devices, real backend, or production Stripe.

global_assessment.summary: The repo shows a strong MVP foundation. Core UI, Stripe onboarding/profile completion, job details architecture, theme work, icons pipeline, and settings redesign are present. The main gaps before release are production Stripe readiness, clear implementation of pricing/commissions/plans, and real-world validation of push notifications and multi-user job flows. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0} :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1} :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

checklist_audit.label: Vérifier que Stripe fonctionne à 100%
checklist_audit.status_label: Implemented in test/dev, not fully locked for production

details: StripeProvider is wired in the app entrypoint. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}
Stripe onboarding/profile completion is documented as backend + frontend operational and production ready for that specific flow. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}
Environment config still contains a production placeholder publishable key: pk_live_VOTRE_CLE_STRIPE_PRODUCTION. :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}

missing_or_uncertain: real production Stripe live key not configured in repo
full end-to-end prod payment validation not proven by repo alone
recommended_next_actions: Set real live publishable key in production config
Run real low-value payment tests in production-safe flow
Validate webhooks and account status refresh on live environment

checklist_audit.label: Ajouter commissions Stripe
checklist_audit.status_label: No clear implementation found in this repo

details: The repo contains extensive Stripe integration and docs, but no clear pricing-engine or commission-by-plan logic was found during the audit. :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6} :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7}

missing_or_uncertain: billing UI showing current plan impact
recommended_next_actions: Define a source of truth for plans and fee percentages
Implement backend fee calculation
Expose fee summary in app and payment flow
Add tests for each plan scenario

checklist_audit.label: Préparer chaque forfait mais ne rendre que le forfait gratuit public
checklist_audit.status_label: No clear subscription/plan gating system found

details: No explicit subscription-plan system or release gating for free/pro/private plans was identified in the audited files. The repo focuses more on operational workflows than plan availability control. :contentReference[oaicite:8]{index=8}

recommended_next_actions: Create plan schema with visibility flags
Only expose free plan in onboarding/signup flow
Keep paid plans in backend/admin config until launch
Add entitlement checks for future premium features

checklist_audit.label: Mettre en place notif push
checklist_audit.status_label: Frontend infrastructure is advanced, runtime validation still needed

details: expo-notifications is installed in dependencies. :contentReference[oaicite:9]{index=9}
A complete push notification service exists with permissions, Expo token retrieval, backend registration, preferences, badges, and listeners. :contentReference[oaicite:10]{index=10}
A NotificationsProvider exists and is mounted in the app. :contentReference[oaicite:11]{index=11} :contentReference[oaicite:12]{index=12}
Project status and master tasks still treated push notifications as not fully complete / phase-2 dependent. :contentReference[oaicite:13]{index=13} :contentReference[oaicite:14]{index=14}

missing_or_uncertain: device token registration validation on physical devices
recommended_next_actions: Test on physical iPhone and Android device
Confirm push token registration reaches backend
Send real push test payloads
Validate badges, app-open routing, and permission edge cases

checklist_audit.label: Vérifier que le passage de jobs fonctionne bien chez chaque user
checklist_audit.status_label: Strong multi-user foundations, but not fully proven end-to-end

details: jobDetails contains crew assignment/removal via real services and includes ownership, permissions, notes counters, payment state, and multi-role behavior. :contentReference[oaicite:15]{index=15}
The project status doc states multi-user read-status for notes is operational. :contentReference[oaicite:16]{index=16}

missing_or_uncertain: job handoff validation for all permission combinations
recommended_next_actions: Test with at least 3 account profiles: owner, manager, worker
Test accept/decline/assign/unassign scenarios
Test cross-company assignment and ownership banners
Document any permission leaks or dead ends

checklist_audit.label: Affiner le contrôle des rôles
checklist_audit.status_label: Good UI and structure present, but still not unquestionably complete

details: A dedicated RolesManagementScreen exists with create/edit/delete/view permissions and scopes. :contentReference[oaicite:17]{index=17}
Roles-related services/hooks/context are present in the repo search results. :contentReference[oaicite:18]{index=18} :contentReference[oaicite:19]{index=19}
Parameters screen links to Roles & Permissions. :contentReference[oaicite:20]{index=20}
Master tasks still classify roles/permissions as phase-2/backend-required in parts of the roadmap. :contentReference[oaicite:21]{index=21}

missing_or_uncertain: full backend enforcement for every screen and endpoint
recommended_next_actions: Create a permission matrix for all critical screens/actions
Test each role against each action
Ensure backend rejects unauthorized actions even if UI is bypassed

checklist_audit.label: Page job details → améliorer la section ressources
checklist_audit.status_label: Job details is heavily improved, but this specific sub-item is not explicitly confirmed

details: jobDetails is a large, actively developed screen with sections for summary, job, client, notes, payment, crew handling, ownership, timer, validation, and modals. :contentReference[oaicite:22]{index=22}
Recent commits show continuing work on photos, pagination, and Job Details UX.
The checklist phrase 'resources section' does not map cleanly to one clearly finished component in the audited files.

missing_or_uncertain: definition of what exactly counts as the resources section
whether your intended resources block has all required content/actions
recommended_next_actions: Define the exact resources block expected in MVP
Compare intended UX vs current Job Details sections
Mark this done only after visual/manual review

checklist_audit.label: Changer l’ensemble des icônes de l’app
checklist_audit.status_label: Icons pipeline and app config are in place

details: app.json points to dedicated Cobbr assets for app icons and splash. :contentReference[oaicite:24]{index=24}
There is a dedicated logo resizing workflow and documentation for generating all required icon sizes. :contentReference[oaicite:25]{index=25}

missing_or_uncertain: final visual validation on installed builds
recommended_next_actions: Check icon rendering on Android adaptive icon
Check iOS home screen icon
Check splash/logo visual consistency

checklist_audit.label: Modifier design settings

details: parameters.tsx is a redesigned settings screen with structured sections, toggles, account/business/payment/roles/teams links, and logout flow. :contentReference[oaicite:26]{index=26}

recommended_next_actions: Run a quick visual pass on small screens and dark/light themes

checklist_audit.label: Améliorer design light
checklist_audit.status_label: Theme/design audit and cleanup are clearly present

details: Master tasks document extensive light/dark audit and migration progress. :contentReference[oaicite:27]{index=27}
A major style-system audit commit describes calibration of colors, screens, and unified design behavior.

recommended_next_actions: Do final device-level visual QA in light mode

checklist_audit.label: Bloquer section payment si compte Stripe inactif ou incomplet
checklist_audit.status_label: Stripe status detection exists, but explicit payment lock was not clearly proven

details: Stripe onboarding completion doc defines complete/pending/restricted/incomplete account states and requirements display. :contentReference[oaicite:29]{index=29}
Type/status artifacts around Stripe account state are present in the repo. :contentReference[oaicite:30]{index=30}
No audited file clearly proved that the Job payment section is hard-blocked when Stripe account is inactive/incomplete.

missing_or_uncertain: explicit guard in payment entry flow
clear disable state + explanatory UI in job payment screen
recommended_next_actions: Add a central guard before entering or using payment flow
Block payment CTA when account is incomplete/restricted
Show reason + deep link to complete Stripe profile

strong_signals.evidence: ThemeProvider plus design audit/migration work are present. :contentReference[oaicite:32]{index=32} :contentReference[oaicite:33]{index=33}

strong_signals.name: push_notifications_foundation
strong_signals.evidence: Push service and notifications provider are implemented and mounted. :contentReference[oaicite:34]{index=34} :contentReference[oaicite:35]{index=35} :contentReference[oaicite:36]{index=36}

strong_signals.name: job_details_maturity
strong_signals.evidence: jobDetails is feature-rich and integrates many operational flows. :contentReference[oaicite:37]{index=37}

strong_signals.name: roles_ui_present
strong_signals.evidence: RolesManagementScreen is present and linked from settings. :contentReference[oaicite:38]{index=38} :contentReference[oaicite:39]{index=39}

strong_signals.name: stripe_onboarding_completion_flow
strong_signals.evidence: Stripe profile completion flow is documented as complete. :contentReference[oaicite:40]{index=40}

warning_signals.name: production_stripe_key_placeholder
warning_signals.evidence: Production env still contains placeholder live key. :contentReference[oaicite:41]{index=41}

warning_signals.name: push_notifications_not_fully_proven
warning_signals.evidence: Docs still treat notifications as not fully complete in practice. :contentReference[oaicite:42]{index=42} :contentReference[oaicite:43]{index=43}

warning_signals.name: plan_and_commission_logic_not_visible
warning_signals.evidence: No clear implementation of plan visibility or commission rules found during audit.

warning_signals.name: payment_guard_not_explicitly_verified
warning_signals.evidence: Stripe status UX exists, but explicit payment blocking was not clearly located. :contentReference[oaicite:44]{index=44}

reasoning: Core app structure looks close to MVP-ready. :contentReference[oaicite:45]{index=45}
Production Stripe still has a hard blocker in config. :contentReference[oaicite:46]{index=46}
Plan/commission system is not clearly represented in this repo.
Push and multi-user flows still require real validation.
